name: Cheddar Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl, in the order listed, until combined.
3. Place dough on a baking sheet or into a greased bread pan.
4. Cover and let rise for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
NOTE: All ingredients should be at room temperature unless otherwise noted.
